top_signals.summary: On May 14, Navimeteo and Vaisala Xweather hosted “The New Weather Character of the Mediterranean Sea” at the Grand Hotel Torre Fara in Chiavari, Italy, dedicated to the growing impact of severe weather phenomena on maritime operations.
